overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior in traditional armor exploring a rural Japanese farm settlement at night. The character descends from rocky forest terrain, moves stealthily through tall grass at Riverside Farm, passes under a wooden bridge, and continues through open farmland under a bright moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with autumn foliage

events.description: character begins descending from rocky outcrop onto the forest path

agents.ego_description: samurai warrior walking down from rocky terrain onto a winding forest path surrounded by autumn trees

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation where the character starts
dense trees with red and orange autumn foliage surrounding the path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
scattered mossy boulders lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a samurai warrior standing on a rocky outcrop in a dense autumn forest at night. The character descends onto a winding dirt path surrounded by trees with red and orange foliage, navigating between mossy boulders under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside farm approach with tall grass fields

events.description: character enters tall grass area and switches to stealth crouch mode
character stands up from stealth position and approaches the wooden bridge

agents.ego_description: moving stealthily through tall grass toward a wooden bridge, then standing up and continuing forward

entered.detail: tall white grass fields surrounding the path on both sides
traditional wooden arched bridge spanning over the path ahead
simple wooden post fence lining the farm boundary

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Riverside Farm area, moving through dense tall grass in a stealth crouch. A wooden fence appears on the right as the path opens up. The character then stands and approaches a traditional wooden arched bridge, with stone rocks visible on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: farm settlement with wooden bridge underpass and traditional buildings

events.description: character passes underneath the wooden bridge into a darker sheltered area
exiting the bridge shadow into the lit farm settlement with visible lanterns

agents.ego_description: passing under a wooden bridge and walking through a traditional Japanese farm settlement with wooden buildings

entered.detail: traditional wooden farmhouses with thatched roofs and warm lit lanterns
stacked wooden barrels near the path entrance
traditional stone lantern illuminating the farm entrance

segments.scene_description: The character passes underneath the wooden bridge into temporary darkness, then emerges into a traditional farm settlement. Wooden farmhouses with lit lanterns line the path, with wooden barrels stacked on the left. The wooden fence continues alongside the path as the character moves through the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmland with bright moonlit sky

events.description: bright full moon becomes visible ahead, illuminating the open field with blue light

agents.ego_description: walking through open farmland toward the bright moon on the horizon, with distant mountains visible

entered.detail: large bright full moon low in the night sky casting blue light
snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into wide farmland as the character leaves the settlement behind. A bright full moon dominates the sky ahead, casting a blue glow over the open field. Snow-capped mountains are visible on the distant horizon, and the wooden fence continues into the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded autumn forest into a moonlit rural farm settlement. It begins with a samurai descending from a rocky outcrop through a dense forest of red and orange foliage under a starry night sky. As the character reaches the Riverside Farm, the terrain shifts into dense tall grass and open paths lined with wooden fences, leading the camera toward a traditional arched bridge. The scene then passes through the temporary darkness beneath the bridge to emerge into a settlement of wooden farmhouses illuminated by glowing lanterns and stacked barrels. Finally, the path opens into wide farmland where a bright full moon casts a blue glow over the landscape, revealing snow-capped mountains on the distant horizon.
